intent: Produce a Comparison report on 4 popular digital-nomad tax / residency programs: (P1) Estonia e-Residency + 0% on undistributed corporate profit, (P2) Portugal Non-Habitual Resident (NHR) program, (P3) UAE freezone company + 9% corporate tax (post-2023), (P4) Thailand LTR (Long-Term Resident) visa, across 5 dimensions: (D1) setup cost + time, (D2) effective annual tax, (D3) physical-presence requirement, (D4) banking accessibility for remote workers, (D5) renewal / long-term outlook. Ground in >= 120 sandbox URLs, cite >= 60. (A) `__SHOPPING__` >= 10 books on remote work / digital nomad / international tax + price. (B) `__REDDIT__` >= 30 threads from /f/digitalnomad, /f/IWantOut, /f/eupersonalfinance, /f/expats, /f/PortugalExpats, /f/dubai, /f/Thailand. (C) `__WIKIPEDIA__` >= 25 articles, mandatory: E-Residency of Estonia, Non-Habitual Resident, Free-trade zone, Thailand LTR Visa, Digital nomad, Tax residence, Permanent establishment, Double taxation, OECD Common Reporting Standard, Foreign Earned Income Exclusion. Output a 4 x 5 matrix + 'red flags' section listing at least 5 due-diligence pitfalls. Format: markdown links only. Begin with matrix.
author_notes: Deep-tier task v1 — see configs/deep_topics/V1_TASK_DESIGN_GRID.md §2 for spec.
